title: Case study — Ask Dad (RAG)
summary: RAG chatbot backed by the Signal Dispatch corpus + blueprint docs + voice stack. Mechanically-derived corpus (ADR-0006), Cloudflare Vectorize storage (ADR-0007), already shipped and serving from /api/ask/chat.

strategy.decision: Third AI-products deep-dive — ask-dad is the RAG case study. Five compositions: hero (with the corpus stats — 15 sources, 114 vectors, $0.0007/full-rebuild) → schematic (ask-dad-rag showing derive-corpus → embeddings → Vectorize → chat function) → approach (cite ADR-0006 derive-don't-narrate + ADR-0007 storage choice) → quotable (a real exchange or the architecture quote) → outcome (live endpoint, working RAG, paired use in blueprint portal).
strategy.why: The ask-dad backend is the only piece of the v3 surface that survived the nuke and is currently live. Its case study legitimizes that survival — it's not v2 residue, it's load-bearing infrastructure for both the v3 site (chat FAB if surfaced) and the blueprint portal (this very portal's chat function). Honors R6 by framing the chat as supplementary surface.
strategy.shipped: v2 surfaced ask-dad as the 'Ask — Nino Chavez' page (originally 'Ask Dad — Virtual Nino' before the §6 personality-framing refusal landed). UI was a Rive avatar + chat. The Rive personality framing was refused; the backend was preserved.
strategy.gap: Proposed = case study explaining the RAG architecture + derive-corpus substrate + Vectorize choice; Shipped = personality-framed chat UI.
strategy.question: Does surfacing ask-dad as a case study + a chat FAB (per ADR-0009 plan) keep it supplementary, or does double-surfacing tip it past R6 toward primary?

currentState.summary: v2 chat UI with Rive avatar + 'Virtual Nino' personality framing. Backend at /api/ask/chat preserved post-nuke; UI was deleted 2026-05-25.
sourceFiles: v2 ninochavez-main CF Pages deploy /ai/ask (deleted in nuke)
currentState.annotation: Reframe from chat-UI surface to case-study-about-RAG-architecture. Avatar killed per R6; chat re-surfaces as a FAB only if cluster IA decision keeps it.
